front_page.headline: YOUR WEEK HEADLINE HERE
front_page.byline: By Personal Chronicle Staff | Special Edition
front_page.lead_story: Write a compelling summary of your week here. What were the major themes? What made this week special?
front_page.pull_quote: Insert an inspirational or meaningful quote from your week here.

home_personal.headline: Home Story Headline
home_personal.content: Describe what happened at home or with family this day. Be specific about events, conversations, or achievements.
home_personal.highlight: A key takeaway or memorable moment from this event.

home_personal.headline: Another Home Story
home_personal.content: Continue with other significant home/family events of the week.

home_personal.headline: Personal Projects Update
home_personal.content: Write about ongoing personal projects, hobbies, or individual pursuits.

health_wellness.headline: Fitness Achievements
health_wellness.content: Document your exercise routine, workouts completed, or physical activities. How many days did you exercise? What types of activities?
health_wellness.highlight: Notable improvements in energy, strength, or endurance.

health_wellness.headline: Nutrition Wins
health_wellness.content: Write about your eating habits this week. Home-cooked meals, healthy choices, or dietary achievements.
health_wellness.highlight: How you felt as a result of good nutrition.

health_wellness.headline: Mental Wellness Focus
health_wellness.content: Describe meditation, mindfulness practices, or mental health activities. Digital detox, journaling, or therapy sessions.
health_wellness.highlight: The impact on your mental clarity and emotional state.

work_career.headline: Professional Milestone
work_career.content: Document a significant work achievement, project completion, or career development moment.
work_career.highlight: How this advances your professional goals.

work_career.headline: Skills Development
work_career.content: Write about courses taken, books read, or new skills acquired for professional growth.
work_career.highlight: How these new skills will be applied.

work_career.headline: Relationship Building
work_career.content: Document meaningful professional connections, mentorship moments, or collaborative successes.
work_career.highlight: The value gained from these relationships.

entertainment.headline: Weekend Activities
entertainment.content: Describe movies watched, restaurants visited, concerts attended, or cultural experiences.
entertainment.highlight: What you enjoyed most and why.

entertainment.headline: Literary Progress
entertainment.content: Document books read, articles consumed, or podcasts listened to.

entertainment.headline: Creative Expression
entertainment.content: Write about artistic pursuits, creative projects, or hobbies enjoyed.

looking_ahead.priorities: What are your main focuses for next week? What do you want to accomplish?
looking_ahead.goals: What foundation are you building for the future? What long-term goals are you working toward?
